mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.cover_image, p.article_id, p.sort_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at, a.title AS article_title FROM portfolio p LEFT JOIN articles a ON p.article_id = a.id ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.created_at DESC
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.cover_image, p.article_id, p.sort_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at, a.title AS article_title FROM portfolio p LEFT JOIN articles a ON p.article_id = a.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio (title, cover_image, article_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{title}, #{coverImage}, #{articleId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.cover_image, p.article_id, p.sort_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at, a.title AS article_title FROM portfolio p LEFT JOIN articles a ON p.article_id = a.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.created_at DESC
